Tool 04 of 05

Is Your Website
Losing You Calls?

Most contractor websites look fine - but fail in 3 critical places: speed, mobile experience, and call friction. Answer 12 quick questions about your site and get a Conversion Leak Score with specific fixes.

Site Conversion Checklist 12 factors · Takes 2 minutes

Check every item that currently exists on your website. Be honest - if you're not sure, leave it unchecked. The score is only useful if the inputs are accurate.

Phone & Contact Visibility
Speed & Mobile
Trust Signals
Clarity & Calls-to-Action
